selectionContext.reason: The prior user-testing synthesis file was absent from the repo checkout, so rerun scope was derived from the feature note plus the failed assertions still recorded in validation-state.json.

appliedUpdates.description: Added flow-validator guidance sections for the HTTPS ATS browser surface and the authenticated starter-sheet browser surface, including temporary-port isolation rules.
Recorded that the standard agent-browser path on http://localhost:8080 had a reusable Google session available during the rerun, so starter-sheet validation succeeded without cookie import.
